mapper.select:
SELECT ID, TO_CHAR(TRANSPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TRANSPORT_DATE, DRIVER_NAME, COMPANY, LOADING_POINT, UNLOADING_POINT, CAR_MODEL, VEHICLE_NO, SUPPLY_PRICE, COMPANY_PRICE, IS_HIDDEN, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM TCAR_TRANSPORT
AND IS_HIDDEN = 0
AND TRANSPORT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{dateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRANSPORT_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{dateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND DRIVER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{driverName} || '%'
AND COMPANY LIKE '%' || #{company} || '%'
ORDER BY TRANSPORT_DATE DESC, ID DESC

SELECT ID, TO_CHAR(TRANSPORT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TRANSPORT_DATE, DRIVER_NAME, COMPANY, LOADING_POINT, UNLOADING_POINT, CAR_MODEL, VEHICLE_NO, SUPPLY_PRICE, COMPANY_PRICE, IS_HIDDEN, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM TCAR_TRANSPORT WHERE ID = #{id}
SELECT DISTINCT DRIVER_NAME FROM TCAR_TRANSPORT WHERE IS_HIDDEN = 0 AND DRIVER_NAME IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DRIVER_NAME
SELECT DISTINCT COMPANY FROM TCAR_TRANSPORT WHERE IS_HIDDEN = 0 AND COMPANY IS NOT NULL ORDER BY COMPANY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TCAR_TRANSPORT ( ID, TRANSPORT_DATE, DRIVER_NAME, COMPANY, LOADING_POINT, UNLOADING_POINT, CAR_MODEL, VEHICLE_NO, SUPPLY_PRICE, COMPANY_PRICE, IS_HIDDEN, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( TCAR_TRANSPORT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, TO_DATE(#{transportDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{driverName}, #{company}, #{loadingPoint}, #{unloadingPoint}, #{carModel}, #{vehicleNo}, #{supplyPrice}, #{companyPrice}, 0, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TCAR_TRANSPORT SET TRANSPORT_DATE = TO_DATE(#{transportDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DRIVER_NAME = #{driverName}, COMPANY = #{company}, LOADING_POINT = #{loadingPoint}, UNLOADING_POINT = #{unloadingPoint}, CAR_MODEL = #{carModel}, VEHICLE_NO = #{vehicleNo}, SUPPLY_PRICE = #{supplyPrice}, COMPANY_PRICE = #{companyPrice} WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE TCAR_TRANSPORT SET IS_HIDDEN = 1 WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, TRANSPORT_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM TCAR_TRANSPORT_FILE WHERE TRANSPORT_ID = #{transportId} ORDER BY FILE_ID ASC
SELECT FILE_ID, TRANSPORT_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS CREATED_AT FROM TCAR_TRANSPORT_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TCAR_TRANSPORT_FILE ( FILE_ID, TRANSPORT_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( TCAR_TRANSPORT_FILE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{transportId}, #{originalName}, #{savedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, SYSDATE )
